description: Create a SessionStore interface and a JsonSessionStore implementation
requirement: implement json file storage adapter in src/core/session/

description: Implement getChatHistory(userId) and appendMessage(userId, message) methods
requirement: implement read/write logic for session history

description: Ensure proper-lockfile (or similar) is used to prevent concurrent write corruption
Deliverable: Messages sent via Telegram are successfully saved and appended to a sessions/<user_id>.json file on disk
Create a GeminiAgentWorker class that subscribes to the MessageReceived event on the Event Bus
requirement: implement worker listening to internal bus in src/core/agent/

description: Implement initialization logic to boot up the @google/gemini-cli-sdk
Pass the retrieved chat history (from SessionStore) into the Gemini context
Process the LLM generation using the Gemini 2.5 Flash model
Deliverable: The agent successfully generates a response based on the prompt + JSON history
requirement: verify llm output is generated from input

description: The GeminiAgentWorker emits an AgentResponse event back to the Event Bus
requirement: emit response event out of the engine
